allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('default:', d['bootVersion']['default']\); [print\('-', v['id']\) for v in d['bootVersion']['values']]")
Bash(cd /c/gitProject/SideProjectWeb && echo "=== 도메인 패키지 트리 ===" && find src/main/java/com/commerce/api -type d | sort)

Bash(bash -c 'log="/c/gitProject/SideProjectWeb/docs/dev-log.md"; src="/c/gitProject/SideProjectWeb/src"; if [ -e "$log" ] && [ -d "$src" ]; then n=$\(find "$src" -type f -newer "$log" -print -quit\); if [ -n "$n" ]; then printf "{\\"systemMessage\\":\\"src 코드가 dev-log.md보다 최근에 수정됨 — docs/dev-log.md 갱신을 확인하세요.\\"}"; fi; fi')

Bash(bash -c 'log="/c/gitProject/SideProjectWeb/docs/dev-log.md"; src="/c/gitProject/SideProjectWeb/backend/src"; if [ -e "$log" ] && [ -d "$src" ]; then n=$\(find "$src" -type f -newer "$log" -print -quit\); if [ -n "$n" ]; then printf "REMIND"; fi; fi')

PowerShell(docker ps --format "{{.Names}}  {{.Status}}  {{.Ports}}"; "--- 8080 ---"; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalPort, OwningProcess; "--- compose file ---"; Test-Path "$PWD\\backend\\docker-compose.yml")

PowerShell($deadline = \(Get-Date\).AddSeconds\(60\); do { $h = docker inspect --format '{{.State.Health.Status}}' commerce-mysql 2>$null; if \($h -eq 'healthy'\) { break }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3 } while \(\(Get-Date\) -lt $deadline\); "health: $h")

PowerShell($deadline = \(Get-Date\).AddSeconds\(120\); $status = $null; do { try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8080/actuator/health" -TimeoutSec 3 -ErrorAction Stop; $status = $r.status; if \($status\) { break } } catch { Start-Sleep -Seconds 4 } } while \(\(Get-Date\) -lt $deadline\); "health: $status")
PowerShell(docker exec commerce-mysql mysql -uroot -proot1234 -e "SELECT user, host FROM mysql.user WHERE user='commerce';" 2>&1)
PowerShell(docker exec commerce-mysql mysql -uroot -proot1234 -N -e "SHOW TABLES IN RECOVER_YOUR_DATA;")

PowerShell($creds = @\(@\('root','root1234'\), @\('root',''\), @\('commerce','commerce1234'\)\); foreach \($c in $creds\) { $u=$c[0]; $p=$c[1]; "--- try $u / '$p' ---"; if \($p -eq ''\) { docker exec commerce-mysql mysql -h host.docker.internal -P 3306 -u $u --connect-timeout=4 -N -e "SHOW DATABASES;" } else { docker exec commerce-mysql mysql -h host.docker.internal -P 3306 -u $u "-p$p" --connect-timeout=4 -N -e "SHOW DATABASES;" } })

PowerShell("=== remove compromised container ==="; docker rm -f commerce-mysql; "=== remove volumes \(compromised + stray empty\) ==="; docker volume rm sideprojectweb_commerce-mysql-data backend_commerce-mysql-data; "=== fresh up ==="; docker compose -f "$PWD\\backend\\docker-compose.yml" up -d)

PowerShell($deadline = \(Get-Date\).AddSeconds\(90\); do { $h = docker inspect --format '{{.State.Health.Status}}' commerce-mysql 2>$null; if \($h -eq 'healthy'\) { break }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4 } while \(\(Get-Date\) -lt $deadline\); "health: $h"; if \($h -eq 'healthy'\) { "=== databases ==="; docker exec commerce-mysql mysql -uroot "-pr00t-Cmrc-2026-Xz9Qpve3" -N -e "SHOW DATABASES;" })

PowerShell(docker exec commerce-mysql mysql -uroot "-pr00t-Cmrc-2026-Xz9Qpve3" -N -e "UPDATE commerce.product SET status='DISCONTINUED' WHERE name='P03-Jacket'; UPDATE commerce.product SET status='SOLD_OUT' WHERE name='P05-Sneakers'; SELECT id, name, price, status, created_at FROM commerce.product ORDER BY id;")

hooks.command: log="/c/gitProject/SideProjectWeb/docs/dev-log.md"; src="/c/gitProject/SideProjectWeb/backend/src"; if [ -e "$log" ] && [ -d "$src" ]; then n=$(find "$src" -type f -newer "$log" -print -quit); if [ -n "$n" ]; then printf '{"systemMessage":"\ud83d\udd14 src/ 코드가 dev-log.md보다 최근에 수정됨 — docs/dev-log.md 갱신을 확인하세요."}'; fi; fi
